title: taraxacum kornasii
intro: Taraxacum kornasii, also known as Kornas's dandelion, is a rare and endemic species of dandelion found primarily in Slovakia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum kornasii include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Taraxacum kornasii are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
